correctionOf: The first attempted appointment was mistakenly created in the Liverpool Digital client subaccount calendar; this appointment is created in the PatronPro main account onboarding calendar.

mainAccount.contactLabel: info@picturelle.com / Picturelle client contact in main account

requestedSlot.sourceUserPhrase: tomorrow at 11 a.m. CDMX city time
requestedSlot.duration: 1 hour from Onboarding PatronPro calendar slotDuration

forcedBookingReason: The main onboarding calendar free-slots endpoint returned no available Saturday slot for 2026-06-13; user explicitly requested this exact test run time, so the API call used ignoreDateRange=true and ignoreFreeSlotValidation=true.

notificationBehavior.note: Notifications were enabled because the user clarified this should be a real onboarding session for the client to join.

request.title: Onboarding PatronPro - Liverpool Digital
request.description: Onboarding test run for Liverpool Digital / Picturelle with Oscar Betancourt.

appointment.title: Onboarding PatronPro - Liverpool Digital
appointment.notes: Onboarding test run for Liverpool Digital / Picturelle with Oscar Betancourt.

timezoneReadbackGotcha: HighLevel readback canonicalized 2026-06-13T11:00:00-06:00 CDMX to 2026-06-13T10:00:00-07:00. These are the same instant; verify appointment times by Date.parse/UTC instant, not string equality.
meetingLocationGotcha: The create payload used the calendar google conference meetingLocationId, but the appointment readback did not expose a meetingLocation object or URL. Verify the actual conference link in the GHL UI or notification email when the join link matters.
